headline: A Look At Domino’s Pizza (DPZ) Valuation After A Year Of Weaker Shareholder Returns
summary: Domino's Pizza stock: what recent returns say about sentiment Domino's Pizza (DPZ) has seen its share price under pressure, with a 13.2% decline year to date and a 19.9% total return decline over the past year, prompting investors to reassess expectations. See our latest analysis for Domino's Pizza. Recent trading shows momentum fading, with a 30 day share price return decline of 8.1% and a 90 day share price return decline of 9.4%, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 18.1% contrasts...

headline: Domino’s Pizza price target lowered to $400 from $450 at TD Cowen
summary: TD Cowen lowered the firm’s price target on Domino’s Pizza (DPZ) to $400 from $450 and keeps a Hold rating on the shares. The firm adjusted targets in the restaurant group as part of a Q1 preview, saying its checks and analysis suggest a mixed Q1 earnings season for quick service. TD sees more misses than beats within quick service.
